title: Infosys Announces Ten-Year Strategic Alliance With HanesBrands
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a ten-year strategic alliance with HanesBrands Inc. under which Infosys will serve as HanesBrands' strategic collaborator across its digital, business applications and data landscape. The engagement will use Infosys' proprietary Live Enterprise Automation Platform (LEAP), integrated within Infosys Topaz, to apply generative AI and AIOps technologies. The stated objectives are to help HanesBrands modernize core operations, enhance agility, simplify its IT landscape, unlock greater value from data, reduce operational complexity and accelerate digital transformation. No contract value or financial impact was disclosed.
